item.name: POST Create User (SQL injection in name - safe handling)

TC-10 POST Create Post (long title - boundary)
TC-11 POST Create Post (special chars in title)

exec: pm.test("API handles special chars safely", () => pm.expect([201, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code));

item.name: TC-14 GET Post by ID (use created postId)

exec: pm.test("Title was patched", () => pm.expect(json.title).to.eql("patched title only"));
